examples: No, gracias. Ahora no me apetece nada.
Thus "Una obra vale millares de gracias" (Perez, Afor. i. 198) has the same proverbial ring.
"I think the whole world should be saying, 'Gracias, amigos,' to the Mexicans for the tremendous sacrifice they have made," Ms. Garrett said.
That way, Gracias could skip using an electrical power supply and make the devices breathtakingly small.
En la primera escena, Roma se muestra como una ciudad construida gracias a la esclavitud.
